name: regent_runtime_signature_20260716_floor29_brightest_flame_longline
description: Twelve-turn performance comparison for the latest runtime deck after adding Brightest Flame+ with Royally Approved.

variants.label: Current deck: Brightest Flame+ with Royally Approved
Control: Brightest Flame+ without Royally Approved

assumptions: Fifteen runs match one real-time EV batch.
The comparison isolates deck search cost; relics, powers, potions, enemy state, and combat-specific modifiers are not included.
